plugins.name: Brew
plugins.description: Search, inspect, upgrade and uninstall Homebrew formulae & casks (macOS). Uses Qx context.cli.
plugins.author: qx (ported from Raycast brew by nhojb et al.)

notes_localizations.en: Improved Homebrew package browsing, outdated-item detection, and safe upgrade actions.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 改进 Homebrew 软件包浏览、过期版本识别与安全升级操作。

plugins.name: External Display Control
plugins.description: View external monitor DDC/CI details and adjust brightness from Qx.
plugins.author: mcx

notes_localizations.en: Refined external-display discovery and DDC/CI brightness controls.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 优化外接显示器发现与 DDC/CI 亮度控制。

plugins.name: Pomodoro Island
plugins.description: Reference plugin for declarative Workbench and the structured QxIsland session protocol, with persistent background timing and history.
plugins.author: mcx

notes_localizations.en: Improved persistent Pomodoro sessions, history, and QxIsland controls.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 改进番茄钟持久会话、历史记录与 QxIsland 控制。

notes_localizations.en: Updated the calendar view and Qx compatibility packaging.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 更新日历视图与 Qx 兼容打包。

plugins.name: Qx Bing Wallpaper
plugins.description: Browse Bing's daily images in a native Qx Gallery, then download or set them as wallpaper.
plugins.author: Qx

notes_localizations.en: Adopted the native Workbench Gallery for daily-image browsing, downloads, and wallpaper actions.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 接入原生 Workbench Gallery，统一每日图片浏览、下载与壁纸操作。

plugins.name: QxCoolapk 酷安
plugins.description: Browse Coolapk hot, news, and digital feeds and read complete posts, images, and replies in Qx.
plugins.author: Qx

notes_localizations.en: Initial QxCoolapk release with hot/news/digital feeds, complete article reading, multi-image details, replies, read state, and offline cache.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: QxCoolapk 首发：支持热门、快讯与数码信息流，完整正文阅读、多图详情、回复、已读状态和离线缓存。

plugins.name: QxGH
plugins.description: QxGH — watch GitHub Actions and Releases from public github.com pages (no REST API). Business-only workbench UI.
plugins.author: mcx

notes_localizations.en: Added history-based estimated workflow progress, live elapsed-time updates, and non-destructive refresh behavior.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 新增基于历史耗时的工作流预计进度、实时用时更新，并让刷新过程保留已有列表。

notes_localizations.en: Improved public GitHub Actions and Releases parsing with clearer Workbench status.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 改进公开 GitHub Actions 与 Releases 解析及 Workbench 状态展示。

plugins.name: QxHeihe 小黑盒
plugins.description: 浏览小黑盒社区推荐内容，在 Qx 内查看正文、多图、帖子信息与登录评论。
plugins.author: mcx

notes_localizations.en: Added configurable horizontal or grid multi-image details, host-native keyboard gallery navigation, and preserved article paragraphs.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 新增可配置的横向胶片或网格多图详情、宿主原生键盘大图切换，并修复正文段落合并问题。

notes_localizations.en: Replaced expiring captured feed URLs with live Xiaoheihe request signing for open, refresh, and pagination.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 使用小黑盒实时请求签名替代会过期的抓包 URL，覆盖首次加载、刷新与分页。

notes_localizations.en: Changed the optional comment Cookie to plain text and added the article share URL as the full-detail request source.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 评论 Cookie 改为普通文本输入，并以文章分享链接作为完整详情请求来源。

notes_localizations.en: Fixed first-selection detail loading and added optional authenticated comments with cached offline rendering.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 修复首次选中不加载详情，并新增可选登录评论区及评论离线缓存展示。

notes_localizations.en: Added instant reopen from cache, offline reading, read state, and automatic 3/7-day cleanup.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 新增缓存秒开、离线阅读、已读状态及 3/7 天自动清理。

notes_localizations.en: Initial Xiaoheihe community release with feed browsing and structured post details.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 首个小黑盒社区版本，支持信息流浏览与结构化帖子详情。

plugins.name: Qxpicture
plugins.description: Browse random image APIs, save images, copy them, and set desktop wallpaper.
plugins.author: Qx

notes_localizations.en: Rebuilt API creation as an inline validated Workbench draft with atomic persistence and reliable form focus.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 将 API 新增流程重构为 Workbench 内联校验草稿，原子持久化并修复表单焦点。

notes_localizations.en: Added structured per-API parameter management, deletion, and batch Workbench source updates.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 新增结构化 API 参数管理、删除及 Workbench 数据源批量更新。

plugins.name: Sysinfo
plugins.description: Native Qx System Monitor for CPU, memory, battery health, storage, network, and processes on macOS and Windows.
plugins.author: Qx

notes_localizations.en: Refined native system, storage, network, battery, and process information.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 优化原生系统、存储、网络、电池与进程信息展示。

plugins.name: Unsplash
plugins.description: Search Unsplash photos, download, and set desktop wallpaper. Ported for Qx (Access Key API; likes/OAuth not included).
plugins.author: qx (ported from Raycast unsplash)

notes_localizations.en: Adopted the native media Workbench for photo search, downloads, clipboard, and wallpaper actions.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 接入原生媒体 Workbench，统一照片搜索、下载、剪贴板与壁纸操作。

plugins.name: V2EX
plugins.description: Browse V2EX latest/hot topics with disk cache (stale-while-revalidate). Notifications & nodes need a token.
plugins.author: mcx

notes_localizations.en: Improved cached topic browsing, structured details, nodes, replies, and notification support.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 改进主题缓存浏览、结构化详情、节点、回复与通知支持。

plugins.name: Weather
plugins.description: Current conditions and multi-day forecast via Open-Meteo (or OpenWeatherMap). Cached for fast reopen.
plugins.author: mcx

notes_localizations.en: Initial weather release with cached current conditions and multi-day forecasts.
notes_localizations.zh-CN: 首个天气版本，支持当前天气与多日预报缓存。
